title: Five Nights at Freddy's - Construction
description: (Unfinished) Mod based on Five Nights at Freddy's aiming to add FNaF 1 and 2 and capture the fnaf look and vibe inside of minecraft.
body:
This is a Five Nights At Freddy's mod aiming to add everything until fnaf 2 and possibly help wanted. later down the line I might get into fangames as well. Now whats unique about this mod is unlike most other fnaf mods, I will be using 32x32 instead of 16x16 so It will have its own distinct and hopefully memorible designs.

This mod is focusing more on the artstyle and look of the models rather than features or customization. I do plan to make updates specifically for unrelated stuff such as outdoors and some fanmade props just because theres a lot that isnt seen in the fnaf games that would realistically be there and around a pizzaria.

This mod is a personal project that ive been working on for a WHILE and ive redone the style around once or twice, Im aiming to make this mod visually apealing art style and im trying to push myself to make this mod turn out well.

Anyways, expect more to come!
